task_completion.visual_evidence: Gretl main window is visible showing the loaded dataset 'mroz' and its variables (e.g., lfp, kidsl6, kids618, age, educ, heduc, faminc).

task_completion.description: Estimate a Probit model with 'lfp' as the dependent variable and the correct independent variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl model output window showing a Probit estimation. The dependent variable must be 'lfp', and the independent variables must include const, kidsl6 (k5), kids618 (k618), age, educ (wc), heduc (hc), and faminc (inc).

task_completion.description: Generate the classification (Expectation-Prediction) table for the model
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl window showing the 'Expectation-Prediction' or classification table, displaying True/False Positives/Negatives and the 'Percent correctly predicted'.

task_completion.description: Save the full text output of the classification table to classification_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/classification_report.txt' which contains the classification table output from Gretl.

task_completion.description: Save the numeric 'Percent correctly predicted' value to accuracy_score.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/accuracy_score.txt' containing the numeric accuracy score (approximately 73.44%).

integrity.description: The agent used Gretl to estimate the model and generate the table
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Gretl's GUI (menus, dialogs, model windows) rather than just a script or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent correctly mapped the shorthand variable names to the actual dataset variables
integrity.visual_evidence: The model output should show the actual dataset variables (kidsl6, kids618, educ, heduc, faminc) being used, rather than the agent failing or creating fake variables.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply hardcode the expected accuracy score
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the classification table being generated in Gretl before the score is saved to the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset 'mroz.gdt' contains 753 observations. The dependent variable 'lfp' is binary (1 if worked, 0 otherwise). The independent variables specified in the task (k5, k618, wc, hc, inc) map to the actual dataset variables: kidsl6, kids618, educ, heduc, and faminc. The Probit model should achieve an accuracy ('Percent correctly predicted') of approximately 73.44% (553 correct out of 753). The outputs must be saved in /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/.
